title: Bacterial Isolate Tree Builder: A Workflow for Sanger-based 16S Phylogeny and Metadata Mapping
author: Bassyouni, Mahmoud
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This lightweight pipeline automates the construction of a phylogenetic tree from Sanger-sequenced 16S rRNA gene data. It performs sequence alignment, tree inference, and metadata integration for visualization in iTOL. The tool extracts sample-specific metadata from an Excel sheet, maps annotations (e.g., species and experimental conditions), and generates formatted iTOL annotation files for publication-ready trees. Before running the script, users must unzip the provided consensus.zip file to access the input FASTA files.
steps_raw: This lightweight pipeline automates the construction of a phylogenetic tree from Sanger-sequenced 16S rRNA gene data. It performs sequence alignment, tree inference, and metadata integration for visualization in iTOL. The tool extracts sample-specific metadata from an Excel sheet, maps annotations (e.g., species and experimental conditions), and generates formatted iTOL annotation files for publication-ready trees. Before running the script, users must unzip the provided consensus.zip file to access the input FASTA files.
